series_metadata.series_description: History of cases worked by the Employer Compliance Department. They contain a record of all contacts and correspondence related with attempting to get the employer back into compliance.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Resolved cases – retain for three (3) years in the Employer Compliance SharePoint Tracker. Referred cases – if referred to Special Investigations – retain for five (5) years after case is resolved in the Employer Compliance SharePoint Tracker., Electronic: Delete
